---
title: "Mini Project"
author: "Sean Lydon, Tyler Gilber, Ethan Martin, Tim Damasco"
date: "2026-03-31"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library()
```


## Task 1


## Task 2


## Task 3


## Task 4


## Task 5
